title: Lolth
bodyText:
The Spider Queen; the drow god. Matriarchal, cruel, and **personally invested in punishing deserters**. "The dark lady is trying to find you. **Each of her legs is coming for you**" — [[ms-judy]] to [[pc-varen|Varen]]. Her eight legs = **eight assassins** ([[the-eight-legs]]). Art: art/lolth.jpg

# Her stake in [[the-pool|the Pool]] arc (grill 2026-07-09)
**Lolth did not make the Pool** — she knows of it and used it to **cage (and slowly destroy) [[eilistraee]]** inside it ([[eilistraee]], [[the-pool]]). She hunts the marked to keep her daughter powerless and forgotten. Her drow converge on the Pool to **stop the party from freeing her** — so freeing Eilistraee is a **direct blow to Lolth** (exactly what [[kennarea|Kena]] wants: "find Eilistraee, kill Lolth").
